_comment: Testimonials sourced from verified Google, Angi, and Trustindex reviews as of March 2026. 13 from CT branch, 13 from MA branch.

testimonials.quote: Matt and Mike are excellent. Matt is always a text away and Mike was on time and quick. You can tell they take pride in their work. We're really happy with the repair!
testimonials.author: Thomas C.

testimonials.quote: Luke was incredibly helpful. He responded within minutes and was able to resolve my problem immediately. He is very knowledgeable and left me feeling confident moving forward.
testimonials.author: Luke S.

testimonials.quote: I was so stressed about my foundation from an old house I inherited. They got back to me quickly, gave a straightforward cost estimate, and explained exactly what was going on.
testimonials.author: Nick S.

testimonials.quote: Other contractors struggled with the crack behind my oil tank, but Luc was able to solve the problem easily. He was polite and explained the material and process clearly.
testimonials.author: Lucero N.

testimonials.quote: It was delightful working with Matt and Michael. They provided a fast quote and then immediately got me on the schedule for repair. Their work was professional and well done.
testimonials.author: Gareth G.

testimonials.quote: Worker Justin who arrived to do the work in my basement was thorough, neat and professional. He explained the whole process and left the work area cleaner than when he arrived.
testimonials.author: Anthony R.

testimonials.quote: Amazingly professional experience from start to finish. Luke, Justin and Mike were fantastic, providing the best solution and scheduling the fix promptly.
testimonials.author: Mary K.

testimonials.quote: Luc was referred to us after we found a crack in our foundation. He was here within an hour to take a look. He did a very thorough job investigating and fixed it perfectly.
testimonials.author: Karen W.

testimonials.quote: Attack A Crack was the least expensive and came with a lifetime guarantee. Two months later the seal has held through heavy rain and there hasn't been any leaking.
testimonials.author: Elizabeth S.

testimonials.quote: Excellent service and work product. They fixed our foundation cracks quickly and left the work area cleaner than when they arrived. Highly recommend Luc and his team.
testimonials.author: Loren S.

testimonials.quote: Excellent from start to finish. Prompt inspection to bid, fast bid development and good communication. They answered all my questions promptly and the work was top tier.
testimonials.author: John K.

testimonials.quote: As a professional in the industry, I've called Luc since 2016 for customer foundation problems. He is incredibly responsive and always guides me toward a solution.
testimonials.author: Industry Pro

testimonials.quote: My cellar has been bone dry since Attack A Crack did the repair work. The repair they did was less of an eyesore than what other companies had planned.
testimonials.author: David W.

testimonials.quote: Justin was right on time and thorough in sealing our cracks against heavy rain. His 20+ years of experience really shows in the quality of the finish.
testimonials.author: Robert B.

testimonials.quote: I texted photos of my bulkhead leak and had a quote in minutes. Matt and Mike are professional, clean, and the leak is finally gone. Amazing service.
testimonials.author: Sarah J.

testimonials.quote: Luc gave me an honest assessment and even suggested some DIY tips for the smaller issues. They didn't try to sell me anything extra. Truly an honest company.
testimonials.author: Jennifer M.

testimonials.quote: They fixed our bulkhead leak that two other companies couldn't solve. The injection method they use is the only thing that actually worked. Highly recommend for bulkheads!
testimonials.author: Mark D.

testimonials.quote: Had water seeping in around our sewer pipe. Luc's team sealed it permanently in one visit. Quick, clean, and the lifetime guarantee gives us real peace of mind.
testimonials.author: Brian L.

testimonials.quote: We had a structural crack that needed reinforcement. The carbon fiber stitches they installed look great and the wall is rock solid now. Matt explained everything clearly.
testimonials.author: Kevin P.

testimonials.quote: Sent a photo to Luke on a Sunday and had a quote back before dinner. They were on site Tuesday and the job was done by noon. You can't beat that level of service.
testimonials.author: Diane R.

testimonials.quote: Mike was a total professional. He was thorough, neat, and quick but took the time to explain the science behind the injection. Our basement is finally dry.
testimonials.author: Steven L.

testimonials.quote: I thought I had a major structural issue, but Luc told me it was just a surface crack and showed me how to seal it myself. That level of honesty is rare in this industry.
testimonials.author: Paul G.

testimonials.quote: They repaired three cracks in our finished basement and you can't even tell they were here. Everything was masked off perfectly and they cleaned up every speck of dust.
testimonials.author: Laura H.

testimonials.quote: The lifetime transferable warranty was the deciding factor for us. Knowing the repair is covered even if we sell the house made the investment a no-brainer.
testimonials.author: Michelle T.

testimonials.quote: Had a major leak during the last nor'easter. Matt got back to me during the storm and had a crew out the next day. They saved our newly finished basement!
testimonials.author: Jason B.

testimonials.quote: Had a small leak and within a day Justin came out and fixed it. He was very professional and the price was fair. Haven't had a drop of water since.
testimonials.author: Michael L.
